title: The better AI gets, the smaller its share of the economy might get – Alex Imas and Phil Trammell
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews economists Alex Imas and Phil Trammell on the economics of AGI. They explore how AI's productivity gains might paradoxically shrink its economic share, discuss optimal taxation and wealth redistribution mechanisms, and examine scenarios for global inequality and developing nation participation in AI-driven wealth creation.
